nodes.name: 利馬大區
nodes.summary: 利馬大區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Tumbesian tyrannulet、Baird's flycatcher、Piura chat-tyrant等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Striated earthcreeper
nodes.summary: Striated earthcreeper（Striated earthcreeper，学名 Geocerthia serrana），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 卡哈马卡大区
nodes.summary: 卡哈马卡大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联25种鸟类，包括灰颏隐蜂鸟、紫颏毛腿蜂鸟、小领蜂鸟等25种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 胡宁大区
nodes.summary: 胡宁大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括高山斑䳍、秘魯鸊鷉、Puna plover等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 萬卡韋利卡大區
nodes.summary: 萬卡韋利卡大區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括须蜂鸟、Striated earthcreeper、白腹抖尾地雀等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the striated earthcreeper is found in the Andes of northern and central Peru from the Department of Cajamarca south to the departments of Lima and Junín

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the striated earthcreeper is found in the Andes of northern and central Peru from the Department of Cajamarca south to the departments of Lima and Junín

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the striated earthcreeper is found in the Andes of northern and central Peru from the Department of Cajamarca south to the departments of Lima and Junín

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: huancavelicae is found only in the southern Peruvian Andes of the Department of Huancavelica. The striated earthcreeper inhabits areas of denser woody vegetation than most other earthcreepers

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It mostly occurs in arid montane scrublands, on rocky slopes with bushes, and in Polylepis woodlands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "Human activity has little direct effect on the Striated Earthcreeper, other than the local effects of habitat destruction, such as from overgrazing."
